moments.title: Commonwealth Games Underway
moments.blurb: The 2026 Commonwealth Games in Victoria, Australia, officially kicked off yesterday and will run until August 9th, featuring athletes from across the Commonwealth.

angles.name: Opening Buzz
angles.copy: The Commonwealth Games are officially underway in Victoria! Who are you backing for gold this year?

angles.name: Team UK Support
angles.copy: Good luck to all the UK athletes competing at the Commonwealth Games in Victoria! Bring home the medals!

moments.title: Latitude Festival Wraps Up
moments.blurb: The Latitude Festival, held at Henham Park in Suffolk, is coming to a close this weekend, having run from July 23rd to 26th, celebrating music, arts, and comedy.

angles.name: Festival Farewell
angles.copy: That's a wrap on Latitude Festival for another year! What were your favourite moments from Henham Park?

angles.name: Best Bits
angles.copy: As Latitude Festival winds down, we want to know: who delivered the standout performance this year?

moments.title: Steelhouse Festival Underway
moments.blurb: The Steelhouse Festival, Wales's premier classic rock festival, is taking place this weekend, July 24-26, 2026, in the stunning Welsh mountains.

angles.name: Rocking Wales
angles.copy: Steelhouse Festival is roaring through the Welsh mountains this weekend! Who's there for the ultimate rock experience?

angles.name: Welsh Rockers
angles.copy: From the Valleys to the world, Steelhouse Festival is bringing the best of rock to Wales. What's been your highlight so far?

moments.title: Jennifer Lopez's 57th Birthday
moments.blurb: Today, July 24th, marks the 57th birthday of global superstar Jennifer Lopez, known for her chart-topping hits and iconic film roles.

angles.name: Happy JLo Day
angles.copy: It's Jennifer Lopez's birthday today! She turns 57. Drop your favourite JLo track in the comments!

angles.name: Jenny From The Block
angles.copy: From the Bronx to global icon, Jennifer Lopez is 57 today! What's your go-to JLo movie or song?

moments.title: Kristin Chenoweth's 58th Birthday
moments.blurb: Award-winning singer and actress Kristin Chenoweth celebrates her 58th birthday today, July 24th, known for her powerful voice and Broadway performances.

angles.name: Broadway Baby
angles.copy: Happy 58th Birthday to the incredible Kristin Chenoweth! What's your favourite musical moment from her career?

moments.title: Verdine White's 75th Birthday
moments.blurb: Verdine White, the iconic bassist and founding member of Earth, Wind & Fire, celebrates his 75th birthday tomorrow, July 25th.

angles.name: Boogie Wonderland
angles.copy: Get ready to groove! Verdine White from Earth, Wind & Fire turns 75 tomorrow. What's your ultimate EWF dance track?

angles.name: Legendary Bassist
angles.copy: Celebrating the enduring rhythm of Earth, Wind & Fire! Verdine White's 75th is tomorrow. What's your favourite EWF album?

moments.title: Thurston Moore's 68th Birthday
moments.blurb: Thurston Moore, influential guitarist and co-founder of alternative rock band Sonic Youth, celebrates his 68th birthday tomorrow, July 25th.

angles.name: Alt Rock Icon
angles.copy: Happy 68th birthday to Sonic Youth's Thurston Moore tomorrow! What's your favourite track from the alt-rock pioneers?

moments.title: Maureen McGovern's 77th Birthday
moments.blurb: Maureen McGovern, the acclaimed singer and Broadway star known for 'The Morning After,' turns 77 on July 27th.

angles.name: Morning After Star
angles.copy: Celebrating Maureen McGovern's 77th birthday on Monday! Her voice graced some timeless classics. What's your favourite?

moments.title: Summer Nights at the Bandstand Begins
moments.blurb: The Summer Nights at the Bandstand concert series returns to Glasgow's Kelvingrove Park from July 27th to August 15th, offering a diverse lineup of artists.

angles.name: Glasgow Gigs
angles.copy: Summer Nights at the Bandstand kicks off in Glasgow on Monday! Who are you excited to see at Kelvingrove Park?

angles.name: Scottish Summer Sounds
angles.copy: Live music returns to Glasgow's iconic bandstand! Get ready for Summer Nights starting July 27th.

moments.title: Simon Kirke's 77th Birthday
moments.blurb: Simon Kirke, the legendary drummer for Free and Bad Company, will celebrate his 77th birthday on July 28th.

angles.name: Rock Royalty
angles.copy: The man behind the beat for Free and Bad Company, Simon Kirke, turns 77 on Tuesday! What's your favourite classic rock track he played on?

moments.title: Jacoby Shaddix's 50th Birthday
moments.blurb: Jacoby Shaddix, the dynamic lead singer of rock band Papa Roach, will turn 50 on July 28th.

angles.name: Nu-Metal Milestone
angles.copy: Can you believe Papa Roach's Jacoby Shaddix is turning 50 on Tuesday? Time flies! What's your favourite Papa Roach anthem?

moments.title: Geddy Lee's 73rd Birthday
moments.blurb: Rush frontman and legendary bassist Geddy Lee celebrates his 73rd birthday on July 29th.

angles.name: Rush Legend
angles.copy: Happy 73rd to the one and only Geddy Lee of Rush on Wednesday! What's your favourite Rush track to crank up?

angles.name: Prog Rock Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating Geddy Lee's birthday this week! His distinctive voice and basslines defined a generation of rock. What's his best album?

moments.title: Martina McBride's 60th Birthday
moments.blurb: Award-winning country music superstar Martina McBride turns 60 on July 29th.

angles.name: Country Queen
angles.copy: Happy 60th Birthday to the incredible Martina McBride on Wednesday! What's your favourite power ballad from her?

moments.title: Wilderness Festival Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The eclectic Wilderness Festival begins on July 30th and runs until August 2nd in Oxfordshire, promising a mix of music, arts, and culinary delights.

angles.name: Festival Fever
angles.copy: Wilderness Festival starts next Thursday! Who's heading to Oxfordshire for four days of unforgettable experiences?

moments.title: Camp Bestival Dorset Begins
moments.blurb: Camp Bestival Dorset, the family-friendly festival at Lulworth Castle, kicks off on July 30th, featuring headliners like Bastille, Fatboy Slim, and Billy Ocean.

angles.name: Family Festival Fun
angles.copy: The countdown is on for Camp Bestival Dorset, starting July 30th! Who are you most excited to see on the lineup?

angles.name: Lulworth Lineup
angles.copy: From Bastille to Billy Ocean, Camp Bestival Dorset has a huge lineup next week! What's your must-see act?

moments.title: Kate Bush's 68th Birthday
moments.blurb: The enigmatic and influential singer-songwriter Kate Bush will celebrate her 68th birthday on July 30th.

angles.name: Running Up That Hill
angles.copy: Happy 68th Birthday to the legendary Kate Bush on Thursday! What's the one song of hers you can listen to on repeat?

angles.name: Musical Genius
angles.copy: A true icon, Kate Bush turns 68 next week. Her unique artistry has captivated generations. What's your favourite Kate Bush album?

moments.title: Paul Anka's 85th Birthday
moments.blurb: Legendary Canadian-American singer and songwriter Paul Anka will celebrate his 85th birthday on July 30th.

angles.name: Timeless Crooner
angles.copy: My Way... to Paul Anka's 85th birthday next Thursday! What's your favourite song from the timeless crooner?

moments.title: Fatboy Slim's 63rd Birthday
moments.blurb: Iconic DJ and producer Fatboy Slim, aka Norman Cook, will celebrate his 63rd birthday on July 31st.

angles.name: Right Here, Right Now
angles.copy: Get ready to 'Eat, Sleep, Rave, Repeat' for Fatboy Slim's 63rd birthday next Friday! What's your ultimate Norman Cook track?

angles.name: Big Beat Boss
angles.copy: From Brighton beach to global stages, Fatboy Slim turns 63 next week! What's your favourite memory associated with his music?

moments.title: Joe Elliott's 67th Birthday
moments.blurb: Joe Elliott, the distinctive lead vocalist of rock legends Def Leppard, celebrates his 67th birthday on August 1st.

angles.name: Pour Some Sugar
angles.copy: Rock of Ages! Def Leppard's Joe Elliott turns 67 next Saturday. What's your all-time favourite Def Leppard anthem?

angles.name: Hair Metal Hero
angles.copy: Celebrating the voice behind so many iconic rock hits! Joe Elliott's birthday is August 1st. What's his most underrated song?

moments.title: Chuck D's 66th Birthday
moments.blurb: Chuck D, the influential leader of hip-hop group Public Enemy, will celebrate his 66th birthday on August 1st.

angles.name: Fight The Power
angles.copy: Happy 66th Birthday to Public Enemy's Chuck D next Saturday! What's the most impactful Public Enemy track for you?

moments.title: James Hetfield's 63rd Birthday
moments.blurb: James Hetfield, the iconic frontman and rhythm guitarist of heavy metal giants Metallica, turns 63 on August 3rd.

angles.name: Metal Master
angles.copy: Enter Sandman! Metallica's James Hetfield turns 63 next Monday. What's your definitive Metallica track?

angles.name: Unforgiven Voice
angles.copy: Celebrating a true metal legend! James Hetfield's birthday is August 3rd. What's your favourite Metallica album?

moments.title: Summer Holiday Vibes
moments.blurb: With school summer holidays in full swing across the UK, many are enjoying breaks and planning staycations or trips abroad.

angles.name: Summer Getaway
angles.copy: Summer holidays are HERE! Whether you're staycationing or jetting off, what's your favourite part of the great British summer?

angles.name: Local Summer Fun
angles.copy: School's out for summer! What local hidden gems are you exploring in [Your Area/Wales/Devon] during the holidays?
